sectionHeadings: 006 — Client Encore integration: SPA auth stores and the committed typed client
3.3 Security hardening in the auth stores
FR-006 — Auth-store isolation from the generated client
record.summary: Both Vue Pinia auth stores consume Encore-native response payloads directly (no envelope unwrapping), obtain the CSRF token from the endpoint body, and target the API on port 4000 via the Vite dev proxy. A generated typed Encore client is committed at apps/web/src/lib/encore-client.ts and kept fresh by the client-staleness CI job (spec 011).
record.title: Client Encore integration: SPA auth stores and the committed typed client
